events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 63
events.blurb: Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 63rd birthday today, a legendary artist known for her unique voice and style.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Cyndi Lauper turns 63 today, the legendary voice behind Time After Time and Girls Just Want to Have Fun, Nation 80s celebrates her birthday with her greatest hits

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael would have been 63 today, a talented artist and songwriter who left a lasting impact on the music world.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: George Michael would have been 63 today, we remember his incredible music and legacy on Nation 80s and Nation 90s

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Michael Jackson's death, a musical icon who changed the world with his music and dance.

angles.name: King of Pop
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, on the anniversary of his death, Nation 80s and Nation 90s pay tribute to his music and legacy

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, the legendary drummer of The Beatles.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86 today, the iconic drummer of The Beatles, Nation 60s celebrates his birthday with Beatles classics

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May celebrates his 74th birthday today, the legendary guitarist of Queen.

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74 today, the iconic guitarist of Queen, Nation Rocks celebrates his birthday with Queen's greatest hits

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83

angles.name: Rolling Stones Legend
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83 today, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Nation 60s and Nation Rocks celebrate his birthday with Rolling Stones classics

events.title: MTV Launched
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, changing the music landscape with its 24-hour music video format.

angles.name: MTV Revolution
angles.copy: MTV launched 45 years ago, revolutionizing the music industry with its 24-hour music video format, Nation 80s looks back at the impact of MTV

events.title: Oasis release Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definitely Maybe on this day in 1994, a pivotal moment in the Britpop movement.

angles.name: Britpop Classics
angles.copy: Oasis released Definitely Maybe 32 years ago, a seminal album in the Britpop era, Nation 90s celebrates the album's anniversary

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place on this day in 1969, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Woodstock Memories
angles.copy: The Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a moment that defined a generation, Nation 60s looks back at the festival's impact

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of Elvis Presley's death, a musical icon who changed the world with his music.

angles.name: King of Rock
angles.copy: Elvis Presley passed away 49 years ago, the King of Rock and Roll, Nation 60s pays tribute to his music and legacy

events.title: Tupac Shakur is shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on this day in 1996, a tragic event that changed the music world.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, a hip hop legend whose music and legacy continue to inspire, Nation 90s remembers his impact

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970, a musical icon who changed the world with his unique sound.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Jimi Hendrix passed away 56 years ago, a guitar legend whose music and legacy continue to inspire, Nation 60s pays tribute to his music

events.title: The Beatles release Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road on this day in 1969, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Beatles Classic
angles.copy: The Beatles released Abbey Road 57 years ago, a seminal album in their discography, Nation 60s celebrates the album's anniversary

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75

angles.name: Pretenders Legend
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, the iconic voice behind The Pretenders, Nation 80s celebrates her birthday with Pretenders classics

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54

angles.name: Oasis Legend
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 54 today, the iconic voice of Oasis, Nation 90s celebrates his birthday with Oasis classics

events.title: John Lennon releases Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine on this day in 1971, a pivotal moment in his solo career.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon released Imagine 55 years ago, a seminal album in his solo discography, Nation 70s celebrates the album's anniversary

events.title: Apple releases the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on this day in 2001, a revolutionary device that changed the music industry.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago, a game-changing device that transformed the music industry, we look back at its impact

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, a celebration of the iconic spy franchise.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, we're shaken not stirred as we celebrate the iconic spy franchise, from the cars to the music, we've got it all covered
